description:
You are a transportation planner evaluating curbside management on the Bologna Pasubio network. Create a custom freight vehicle ('delivery_van', vClass 'delivery') named 'parcel_van_1' that departs at 200 seconds and follows a route of at least 4 connected edges. The vehicle must make two 60-second parcel drop-offs on different edges of the route, specifically on the rightmost lane (ending in '_0'). Define this vehicle in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_freight.rou.xml and update /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg to include this route file. After running the simulation, record the trip duration and route length for 'parcel_van_1' in ~/SUMO_Output/freight_report.txt using the following format:
van_trip_duration=<duration value>
van_route_length=<routeLength value>
